steps.title: Identify the Key Signal
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation showing Camilla's perception of her immediate surroundings has changed—a shift in how she sees the world, not a change in her actions or emotions.

steps.title: Match the Shift in Perception
steps.content:
Choice C shows the critical moment: “All nature was as she had found it before... but...

Camilla sensed a new strangeness, a vast desolation in everything about her.” The surroundings remain the same, yet her perception shifts from familiar to unsettling.

The other three focus on concealing her expression (A), self-reflection (B), or her emotional reaction and flight (D)—none demonstrate a changed perception of surroundings.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
